flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 25% at Muhlenberg College vs the 2003–2007 baseline (1.8k vs 2.4k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Muhlenberg College rose 20% between 2006 and 2009 ($30.7k → $37.0k).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Muhlenberg College fell 14% between 2021 and 2024 (77.5% → 66.7%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Muhlenberg College rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($55.8k → $62.8k).
